linkPayments.title: Link previous payments
linkPayments.description: Select transactions you've already paid toward this loan to record them as payments.
linkPayments.emptyDescription: No transactions match these filters. Try widening the date range or clearing filters.
linkPayments.success: Linked {count} payment to the loan. | Linked {count} payments to the loan.
linkPayments.error: Couldn't link the selected payments. Please try again.
linkPayments.overpayDescription: The selected payments add up to {amount} more than the remaining loan balance. Link them anyway?

dialog.createDescription: Track a mortgage, auto loan, student loan, or any other liability. You can edit anything later.
dialog.editDescription: Update the loan's terms. Changes to the rate, term, or planned payment are recorded in the events timeline.

settings.title: Settings
settings.editDescription: Update the name, balance, rate, term, payment fields, or lender info.
settings.excludeFromStatsDescription: Hide this loan from net worth, charts, and reports without archiving it.
settings.archiveDescription: Hides the loan from the sidebar and account lists. You can restore it any time.
settings.archivedDescription: It won't appear in account lists or sidebar groups. Restore it to use it again.
settings.archiveConfirmDescription: {name} will be hidden from the sidebar and account pickers.
settings.deleteDescription: Permanently removes the loan and its history. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDescription: {name} and all its events will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteBlockedByPayments: This loan has recorded payments. Delete them first, then you can delete the loan.

empty.title: No loans yet
empty.description: Track mortgages, auto loans, student loans, and other liabilities here.

warnings.no_planned_payment: No planned payment set – projected payoff unavailable.
warnings.payment_below_interest: Planned payment doesn't cover monthly interest – loan would grow.

summary.principalOnlyTooltip: Balance reflects principal payments only. Interest is not accrued automatically – your lender's statement is the source of truth.
summary.balanceAnchorTooltip: The outstanding balance is fixed as of this date. Payments dated before it are kept for history but don't change the Paid progress.

events.title: Timeline
events.empty: No history yet – rate changes, balance corrections, and notes will appear here.

payments.title: Recent payments
payments.empty: No payments recorded against this loan yet.

payment.title: Loan payment
payment.description: Record or edit a payment against this loan.
payment.targetAmountTooltip: Source account is in {source}, loan is in {loan}. We pre-fill the converted amount using the current exchange rate – adjust if your bank applied a different rate.
payment.overdrawWarning: This is more than {account}'s balance and will overdraw the account.
payment.overpayError: Payment exceeds the remaining loan balance ({max}).
payment.deleteConfirmDescription: Both sides of the transfer will be removed and the loan balance will be restored. This cannot be undone.
payment.preAnchorHint: This date is before the loan's balance snapshot, so this payment won't change the outstanding balance – it's already included in the opening balance.
